home.heroTitle: Your lifting and handling partner for 30 years
home.heroSubtitle: Specialist in industrial electronics, hydraulics and bodywork for the lifting sector
home.aboutSubtitle: Industrial expertise at the service of your projects
home.aboutText: For over 30 years, SENERGY has been supporting lifting and handling professionals with adapted technical solutions. Based in Reims, our team of experts offers quality equipment and responsive after-sales service.
home.aboutText2: Our tailored approach and in-depth knowledge of the sector make us a trusted partner for manufacturers, builders and end users.
home.divisionsSubtitle: Three complementary expertises to meet all your needs
home.electronicsDesc: IMET radio controls, automations, sensors and detection solutions for lifting
home.hydraulicsDesc: Hydraulic units, distributors, cylinders and pumps for all industrial applications
home.bodyworkDesc: Custom bodywork, skips, auxiliary cranes and tail lifts
home.productsSubtitle: Discover a selection of our most requested equipment
home.why1Desc: Three decades of know-how in the industrial lifting and handling sector
home.why2Desc: Available and reactive after-sales service to minimize your downtime
home.why3Desc: Each project is unique: we tailor our solutions to your specific needs
home.why4Desc: Products and installations compliant with current European standards
home.newsSubtitle: Stay informed of the latest news from SENERGY
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact our experts for a personalized quote and tailored support

company.title: Our company
company.metaTitle: Our Company | SENERGY - Lifting & Handling Specialist
company.metaDesc: Discover the history, values and team of SENERGY, specialist in lifting and handling for 30 years in Reims.
company.heroSubtitle: 30 years of expertise serving industrial lifting
company.historyText1: Founded over 30 years ago, SENERGY has established itself as a key player in industrial lifting and handling equipment. Based in Reims, in the Croix Blandin business park, our company has built its reputation on technical expertise and quality services.
company.historyText2: Over the years, we have developed three complementary divisions: industrial electronics with IMET radio controls, hydraulics, and industrial bodywork. This versatility allows us to offer comprehensive solutions to our customers.
company.historyText3: Our regional presence in Champagne-Ardenne and our national network allow us to intervene quickly at our customers' sites and support them throughout the life of their equipment.
company.value1Desc: In-depth technical mastery of all our product ranges and solutions
company.value2Desc: A trust-based relationship built on listening and responsiveness
company.value3Desc: Constantly seeking new solutions to improve your performance
company.value4Desc: Robust equipment and quality interventions for maximum availability
company.teamText: Our team of passionate professionals puts its expertise at the service of your projects. Each member of the SENERGY team specializes in their field to provide you with the best technical answers.
company.certText: SENERGY works with the best manufacturers in the sector and complies with current European standards. Official IMET distributor for lifting radio controls, we guarantee products that meet the strictest safety requirements.
company.locationText: Located in Reims, in the heart of the Grand Est region, we operate throughout France for large-scale projects.

electronics.title: Industrial Electronics
electronics.metaDesc: IMET radio controls, automations and sensors for industrial lifting. Custom electronic solutions by SENERGY.
electronics.heroSubtitle: Radio controls, automations and sensors for industrial lifting
electronics.introText: SENERGY's electronics division offers a complete range of solutions for the control and monitoring of lifting equipment. As an official IMET distributor in France, we offer high-quality radio controls as well as automation and detection solutions tailored to your needs.
electronics.radioDesc: Complete range of industrial radio controls for overhead cranes, tower cranes and lifting equipment
electronics.autoDesc: Automation systems to optimize your lifting and handling processes
electronics.sensorDesc: Measurement, weighing and detection solutions for the safety of your installations

radiocontrols.title: IMET Radio Controls
radiocontrols.metaDesc: Industrial IMET radio controls: M880, MR900, Joystick and TR series. Official IMET distributor in France.
radiocontrols.heroSubtitle: Official IMET distributor — Reliable and secure remote control
radiocontrols.introText: IMET is a world reference manufacturer for industrial radio controls. As an official distributor, SENERGY offers the complete IMET range for your lifting and handling applications.
radiocontrols.m880Desc: Compact and robust radio control for cranes and overhead cranes. IP65 sealed housing, up to 16 functions.
radiocontrols.mr900Desc: Professional multi-receiver solution for complex applications. Ideal for large industrial installations.
radiocontrols.joystickDesc: Precise joystick control for maneuvers requiring great dexterity. Ergonomic and intuitive.
radiocontrols.trDesc: Specific radio controls for truck cranes and transport vehicles. Resistant to outdoor conditions.
radiocontrols.certText: All our IMET radio controls are CE certified and comply with the Machinery Directive 2006/42/CE.

hydraulics.title: Hydraulics
hydraulics.metaDesc: Hydraulic units, distributors, cylinders and pumps for industrial lifting. Custom solutions by SENERGY.
hydraulics.heroSubtitle: Hydraulic units, distributors, cylinders and industrial pumps
hydraulics.introText: SENERGY's hydraulics division offers high-performance equipment for all your lifting and handling applications. From design to installation, our team supports you with standard or custom solutions.
hydraulics.groupsDesc: Standard and custom hydraulic power units for all power levels and applications
hydraulics.distributorsDesc: Manual, electrohydraulic and proportional distributors for precise control of your actuators
hydraulics.cylindersDesc: Single and double-acting cylinders, telescopic, for all loads and strokes
hydraulics.pumpsDesc: Gear, piston and vane pumps for all flow rates and pressures
hydraulics.customText: Our hydraulic design office designs and builds complete installations adapted to your technical and environmental constraints. From hydraulic schematics to commissioning, SENERGY ensures your entire project.

bodywork.title: Industrial Bodywork
bodywork.metaDesc: Custom bodywork, skips, auxiliary cranes and tail lifts. Industrial bodywork solutions by SENERGY.
bodywork.heroSubtitle: Custom industrial bodywork, skips and lifting equipment
bodywork.introText: SENERGY's bodywork division designs and builds custom industrial bodywork for light commercial vehicles and heavy goods vehicles. Our equipped workshop and qualified team guarantee you robust and durable achievements.
bodywork.customDesc: Design and manufacture of special bodywork adapted to your operational needs
bodywork.skipsDesc: Tipping skips, hook-lift, and equipment for construction vehicles
bodywork.cranesDesc: Installation and maintenance of auxiliary cranes on trucks and trailers
bodywork.tailliftsDesc: Installation of tail lifts to facilitate loading and unloading
bodywork.workshopText: Our industrial bodywork workshop has the equipment necessary to carry out welding, cutting, painting and assembly work. Our qualified bodymakers work on all types of light commercial vehicles and heavy goods vehicles.

sav.title: After-Sales Service
sav.metaDesc: Responsive after-sales service for your lifting equipment. Repair, maintenance and spare parts. Contact SENERGY SAV.
sav.heroSubtitle: Responsive technical support to minimize your downtime
sav.introText: SENERGY's after-sales service is your dedicated contact for any intervention on your lifting and handling equipment. Our qualified technical team intervenes quickly for troubleshooting, maintenance and parts replacement.
sav.hotlineText: Our technical service is reachable Monday to Friday from 8am to 6pm to answer all your technical questions and organize urgent interventions.
sav.service1Desc: On-site intervention within 24-48h for urgent breakdowns affecting your production
sav.service2Desc: Adapted maintenance programs to prevent breakdowns and extend the life of your equipment
sav.service3Desc: Stock of spare parts for major brands. Fast supply on order.
sav.service4Desc: Technical assistance by phone or remote maintenance to quickly resolve certain problems
sav.formSubtitle: Fill out this form for quick processing of your request

news.title: News
news.metaDesc: Follow the latest news from SENERGY: new products, events and information from the lifting and handling sector.
news.heroSubtitle: Stay informed of the latest news and innovations
news.news1Excerpt: IMET launches its new range of radio controls for overhead cranes with improved features and better ergonomics.
news.news2Excerpt: Our team was present at the MANUTENTION trade show in Paris to present our latest industrial lifting solutions.
news.news3Excerpt: SENERGY launches its new preventive maintenance program for industrial hydraulic equipment.
news.news4Excerpt: SENERGY strengthens its partnership with IMET and becomes exclusive distributor for the Grand Est region.
news.news5Excerpt: SENERGY organizes technical training sessions on the use and maintenance of industrial radio controls.
news.news6Excerpt: Our industrial bodywork workshop is expanding to accommodate new equipment and strengthen our production capacity.

contact.title: Contact
contact.metaDesc: Contact SENERGY, your lifting and handling specialist in Reims. Phone, email and online contact form.
contact.heroSubtitle: Our team is available to answer all your questions
